title: Simpler Ghasts
description: This texture pack changes the textures of the Ghast, Happy Ghast and harnesses to match the style before 25w15a.
body:
This texture pack changes the textures of the Ghast, Happy Ghast and harnesses to match the style before 25w15a.

![Simpler Happy Ghast!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d66ea40ad8046b4682874c402c1df5a55f6bd99.png)
